message:
feat(web): Add AnomalyOverlay, CRISPROverlay, and supporting workers

- Add AnomalyOverlay for statistical anomaly detection with multi-metric
  heatmap, PCA scatter visualization, and ranked anomaly regions
- Add CRISPROverlay for CRISPR pressure mapping with spacer hit
  visualization and anti-CRISPR candidate detection
- Add anomaly.worker.ts with Comlink-wrapped computation for GC skew,
  entropy, KL divergence, compression ratio, and codon bias analysis
- Add crispr.worker.ts for offloading CRISPR analysis to worker thread
- Add synteny-worker.ts for gene synteny alignment with DTW
- Register new overlays in OverlayProvider, index.ts, AnalysisMenu

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
